mapper.select: select id,room_code roomCode,owner_user_id ownerUserId,title,status,create_time createTime from kitchen_group_room where room_code=#{roomCode} and status='1'
select id,room_code roomCode,owner_user_id ownerUserId,title,status,create_time createTime from kitchen_group_room where id=#{id} and status='1'
select id,room_code roomCode,owner_user_id ownerUserId,title,status,create_time createTime from kitchen_group_room where id=#{id}
select count(1) from kitchen_group_member where room_id=#{roomId} and wx_user_id=#{userId}

select m.wx_user_id userId,coalesce(u.nickname,concat('食客',m.wx_user_id)) nickname,u.avatar,m.join_time joinTime from kitchen_group_member m left join kitchen_wx_user u on u.id=m.wx_user_id where m.room_id=#{roomId} order by m.id

select i.dish_id dishId,d.dish_name dishName,d.cover,i.quantity,coalesce(d.virtual_price,0) price,round(i.quantity*coalesce(d.virtual_price,0),2) subtotal,coalesce(u.nickname,'成员') addedBy from kitchen_group_item i join kitchen_dish d on d.id=i.dish_id left join kitchen_wx_user u on u.id=i.wx_user_id where i.room_id=#{roomId} order by i.id desc

select r.id,r.room_code roomCode,r.title,r.create_time createTime,(select count(1) from kitchen_group_member gm where gm.room_id=r.id) memberCount,(select coalesce(sum(gi.quantity),0) from kitchen_group_item gi where gi.room_id=r.id) itemCount,(select d.cover from kitchen_group_item gi join kitchen_dish d on d.id=gi.dish_id where gi.room_id=r.id order by gi.id desc limit 1) cover from kitchen_group_room r join kitchen_group_member m on m.room_id=r.id where m.wx_user_id=#{userId} and r.status='1' order by r.id desc limit 20
mapper.insert: insert into kitchen_group_item(room_id,dish_id,wx_user_id,quantity,create_time) values(#{roomId},#{dishId},#{userId},#{quantity},sysdate()) on duplicate key update quantity=quantity+values(quantity),wx_user_id=values(wx_user_id)
mapper.update: update kitchen_group_room set status='2' where id=#{id} and owner_user_id=#{ownerUserId} and status='1'
mapper.select: select id,invite_code inviteCode,user_a userA,user_b userB,start_date startDate,status,feed_count feedCount,create_time createTime from kitchen_couple_space where (user_a=#{userId} or user_b=#{userId}) and status='1' limit 1
select id,invite_code inviteCode,user_a userA,user_b userB,start_date startDate,status,feed_count feedCount from kitchen_couple_space where invite_code=#{inviteCode} and status='1'
mapper.update: update kitchen_couple_space set user_b=#{userId},bind_time=sysdate() where id=#{id} and user_b is null and user_a<>#{userId}
update kitchen_couple_space set status='0' where id=#{id} and status='1' and (user_a=#{userId} or user_b=#{userId})
mapper.select: select id,title,anniversary_date anniversaryDate from kitchen_couple_anniversary where couple_id=#{coupleId} order by anniversary_date
mapper.update: update kitchen_couple_space set feed_count=feed_count+1 where id=#{id}
mapper.select: select c.id,c.feed_count feedCount,coalesce(a.nickname,'厨房恋人') userAName,coalesce(b.nickname,'等待绑定') userBName from kitchen_couple_space c left join kitchen_wx_user a on a.id=c.user_a left join kitchen_wx_user b on b.id=c.user_b where c.status='1' and c.user_b is not null order by c.feed_count desc,c.id asc limit 20

select r.id,r.room_code roomCode,r.title,r.status,r.create_time createTime,coalesce(u.nickname,concat('用户',r.owner_user_id)) ownerName,(select count(1) from kitchen_group_member m where m.room_id=r.id) memberCount,(select coalesce(sum(i.quantity*coalesce(d.virtual_price,0)),0) from kitchen_group_item i join kitchen_dish d on d.id=i.dish_id where i.room_id=r.id) total from kitchen_group_room r left join kitchen_wx_user u on u.id=r.owner_user_id r.room_code=#{roomCode}and r.status=#{status} order by r.id desc

select c.id,c.invite_code inviteCode,c.start_date startDate,c.status,c.feed_count feedCount,c.create_time createTime,coalesce(a.nickname,concat('用户',c.user_a)) userAName,coalesce(b.nickname,'未绑定') userBName from kitchen_couple_space c left join kitchen_wx_user a on a.id=c.user_a left join kitchen_wx_user b on b.id=c.user_b c.invite_code=#{inviteCode}and c.status=#{status} order by c.id desc
mapper.update: update kitchen_group_room set status=#{status} where id=#{id}
update kitchen_couple_space set status=#{status} where id=#{id}
mapper.select: select id,type,title,content,biz_id bizId,read_flag readFlag,create_time createTime from kitchen_user_notification where wx_user_id=#{userId} order by id desc limit 50
select count(1) from kitchen_user_notification where wx_user_id=#{userId} and read_flag='0'
mapper.update: update kitchen_user_notification set read_flag='1' where wx_user_id=#{userId} and read_flag='0'
